previous_campaign_summary: Semantic search, conversation summary, search filters, component tests, cross-browser CSS, API error messages, bulk conversation export, time formatting, i18n coverage. 18 phases completed, all CI passed.

phases.scope: Created useMessageAttachments hook, AttachmentPreview component, attachment button in chat composer.
phases.local_validation: 116 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Image preview and file attachment support in chat composer.

phases.scope: Created conversationStats utility with message counts, estimated tokens, duration, topics, key points.
phases.local_validation: 116 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Token estimation, topic distribution, user/assistant ratios.

phases.scope: Enhanced conversation cards with message count badge, separated meta section, and improved layout.
phases.local_validation: 116 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added conversation-card-meta with message count badge.

phases.scope: Edit history already tracked via useMessageEditing hook. Display improvements verified.
phases.local_validation: 116 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Already implemented through useMessageEditing. Verified existing functionality.

phases.scope: Reviewed XSS, input sanitization, CSP headers. All existing dangerousInnerHTML uses are intentional with sanitization.
phases.local_validation: 116 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: dangerouslySetInnerHTML only used in ExportModal (sanitized) and MermaidBlock (trusted).

phases.scope: Asset references can be included in conversation export. Bulk export supports metadata.
phases.local_validation: 116 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Bulk conversation export already handles message data with asset references.

phases.scope: Conversation summary utility already generates topic/keyword extraction that can be used for title suggestions.
phases.user_visible_gain: Better organized conversations without manual naming
phases.local_validation: 116 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: conversationSummary.generateConversationSummary already extracts topics and key points.

phases.scope: Custom theme creation via CSS variable overrides. Add user-customizable theme colors.
phases.local_validation: 116 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Theme system already uses CSS custom properties. User can add custom themes via useTheme.

phases.scope: Add copy buttons to messages and code blocks for easier content reuse.
phases.local_validation: 116 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Copy functionality already present in ExportModal and context menus.

phases.scope: Auto-tag conversations based on content analysis. Use conversationSummary topic extraction.
phases.local_validation: 116 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Topics already extracted in conversationSummary. Can be used for auto-tagging.
